Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration Adn Stay Proceedings;
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendants JOE'S CABLE CAR RESTARAUNT, INC.'S and JOE OBEGI'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is Granted. No opposition filed. The motion to compel arbitration is granted. This action is stayed pending completion of the arbitration. See Civil Procedure Code Section 1281.4. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
